prompt: I'm applying to a backend engineer role at Kakao in Seoul. I've got my CV in resumes/ but it's in English one-page ATS format. Can you generate a proper Korean-style resume that shows my full project experience? The Kakao role emphasizes microservices and cloud infrastructure.

assertions.name: mentions_skill_workflow
assertions.description: Response references the korean-resume-builder workflow (gather source facts → choose layout variant → translate to Korean → fill HTML asset → generate PDF)

assertions.name: tailoring_for_company
assertions.description: Response specifically mentions tailoring for Kakao's requirements (microservices, cloud infrastructure) or emphasizes role-specific content selection

assertions.name: korean_layout_pattern
assertions.description: Response identifies the 'experienced developer pattern' or multi-page layout structure, NOT one-page ATS format

assertions.name: output_path_specificity
assertions.description: Response suggests or discusses output path structure (e.g., output/{company-slug}/{role-slug}/ or output/kakao/)

assertions.name: korean_formatting_details
assertions.description: Response mentions Korean date format (YYYY. MM ~), section labels in Korean, or other Korean-specific formatting concerns
